The WhatsApp chat between Nelson, Sancho, Willock


Joe Willock couldn’t be any prouder of Reiss Nelson.

The duo came through our academy system together and Nelson was also the player who came off when Willock made his senior debut from the bench during last season’s Carabao Cup win over Doncaster Rovers.

And after Nelson was named Bundesliga’s Rookie of the Month for scoring three goals for Hoffenheim in October, Willock was quick to praise his good friend.

“Reiss is a very close friend of mine outside of football and every time he does well in a game, it feels like I’m there with him because we’ve been through so much together since we were young,” he told the official matchday programme.

“I’m so happy for him and hopefully when he comes back from loan, he can push on in Arsenal colours as well.

“Me, Reiss and Jason Sancho all have a WhatsApp group and a Snapchat group as well, so we’re talking to each other every day.

“I try to talk to him and motivate him, and he does the same with me. There’s loads of banter flowing around as well, but it’s important for us to push each other every day.”

Leno - Koscielny is the perfect captain for us


As Laurent Koscielny prepares to make his first-team return after seven months out, Bernd Leno is certain the Frenchman will provide a major boost.

The German international has never played with our club captain, but has seen enough in his short time at the club to know how much value he adds - on and off the pitch.

"In training you see how he is talking to other players," Leno said. "We have many young players and he talks to them and for me he is a big personality in the team, in the dressing room.

"Before Tottenham, he was not in the squad but five minutes before the game he said many, many good things about the history of the game, how important it is for the fans, the club, every player, so he is the perfect captain for us.

"He is a big personality and of course he has big quality. I think we should give him the time [to play]. The coach is calm with him because he was a long time injured.

"I am happy for him that maybe he will play [against Qarabag on Thursday], I think he will play because he needs the confidence to play. His body needs also the feeling for the game.

"Of course, he trained a long time for us but the games are more difficult because the game is different for your head. I am happy for him that he will maybe start on Thursday and of course he will be an option for the next weeks in the [main] starting XI."

https://www.arsenal.com/news/leno-koscielny-perfect-captain-us

Alex Lacazette’s fine finish against Liverpool has topped our November Goal of the Month poll.

Trailing 1-0 to Jurgen Klopp’s side at Emirates Stadium, the France striker latched on to an Alex iwobi pass in the area, twisted to buy himself some space and curled the ball into the far corner past Allison.

Lacazette’s strike - his second Goal of the Month win of the season - was the overwhelming winner with 71 per cent of the votes cast, with Henrikh Mkhitaryan’s effort against Wolves in second place.

Nevertheless, the club’s former goalkeeper David Seaman believes his former side can make a return to Europe’s elite competition next season by finishing in top four.

“Man City, Liverpool, Chelsea, and Arsenal,” Seaman told Mirror Football at the Pride of Sport awards while predicting how the standings in the league table will look like come season ending.

“Top four’s a great season. The only other way [to qualify for the Champions League] is through the Europa League, but I think that will be quite difficult with the teams dropping out of the Champions League.

“We don’t know, Arsenal are a great cup team. But ideally top four’s a great season.”

'Celtic wanted me' Alex Iwobi on how he had the chance to leave Arsenal for the Hoops

Arsenal star Alex Iwobi has revealed he could've signed for Celtic as a teenager.

He knuckled down and became a key player under Arsene Wenger before earning the trust of Emery.

He told Arsenal's matchday programme: “My situation was weird

“There was three of us at the time and we were basically told ‘stay if you want, or if not you are free to go.”

“It was up to me and at that moment I went to the Crystal Palace training ground to see them.

“I had offers from Celtic and Southampton as well. Celtic was the main one but I wasn’t ready to go to Scotland. I thought it was best to stay at Arsenal but I have to say it felt weird.

“I was playing for England but I felt maybe I wasn’t rated. My England team-mates and everyone else was getting in my ear saying that Arsenal don’t love me because they weren’t offering me a deal.

“It was hard especially because at school as well everyone was talking about it."

Torreira is our November Player of the Month

Torreira is our November Player of the Month

It has been quite some start to the season for Lucas Torreira, and now he's been named as our November Player of the Month!

The Uruguayan midfielder has been in dazzling form ever since joining the club, adding energy and bite to the base of our midfield.

He started November in fine style, impressing with a man-of-the-match performance as we drew 1-1 with Liverpool before coming close to scoring in our draw with Wolves.

The 22-year-old then struck the post and claimed another man-of-the-match award as we won 2-1 away at Bournemouth.

 Lucas received 70 per cent of the votes cast, with Bernd Leno and Rob Holding finishing in second and third place respectively.

According to Cadena Ser in Spain, Unai Emery is assessing a January bid for Real Valladolid defender Fernando Calero.

The 23-year-old, an ever-present in La Liga this season, has been linked with a couple of big clubs, including Borussia Dortmund and Sevilla. Interest is particularly hot right now, as it’s said he has a clause in his contract that means he’s available for as little as €11 million next month.

Having just lost Rob Holding for the rest of the season and with Dinos Mavropanos still sidelined, the Gunners are short on bona fide centre-backs at the moment.

Laurent Koscielny is set to make his long-awaited return from injury this week but at 33-years-old there are doubts about his long-term future. It means, much responsibility currently rests on the shoulders of Shkodran Mustafi and Sokratis, both of whom will be suspended on Sunday when Arsenal travel to Southampton.

It’s a bit early to tell whether we have any real interest in Calero but you’d expect us to be assessing a few names ahead of the January transfer window opening in three weeks.

The Dortmund link is interesting…we can only assume Sven’s wholesale bugging of the Westfalenstadion is still paying dividends.
覓膠草埋有幾多GB?

Houssem Aouar has been attracting increasing transfer attention since his good performance in the Champions League against Manchester City at the end of November.

Pep Guardiola praised the player publicly after the match, and his City assistant Mikel Arteta was seen talking to Aouar and taking notes.

Shortly after that, claims emerged in France of contact already having been made from the Premier League champions about a potential transfer in the future.

In their edition this week, France Football take a look at interest in the 20 year old midfielder, and say Arsenal are ‘particularly’ keen.

Unai Emery is said to appreciate the versatility of the youngster, and it’s believed he could be a replacement for Aaron Ramsey, who is expected to leave Arsenal when his contract expires in the summer.

Whether or not the Gunners qualify for the Champions League is thought to be a factor in them making a move, which would be at the end of the season, and it’s stated a deal for the player ‘could exceed €40m’

近日我接受傳媒訪問時，曾表示將會轉用華為手機，以示對這家內地企業的一點支持。故此昨晚我出席完活動後，便去到時代廣場買了一部最新推出的華為Mate 20 Pro。

據店員表示，這部手機不單屏幕夠大、解像度高，效能十分出眾，手機內的主要晶片也是由華為自行研發，最特別是備有三個鏡頭，拍攝效果出色。他更表示這部手機十分受歡迎，不時都有顧客查詢，他們也只賣剩一部呢。

我本打算買這部手機自用，但後來一想，目前我正在使用的三星手機依然運作正常，為免浪費、製造更多電子垃圾，故此我決定把這部新手機捐予新民黨，作為下星期舉行聖誕派對的抽獎禮物，且看看到時哪位幸運的同事能夠獲得這份價值$6,888的聖誕禮物吧。//

近年來前往日本的中國遊客人數迅速增加，也投注不少觀光財，然而中國人的舉止也造成日人的困擾。

《news-postseven》報導，像是在風俗區的店家裡，有中國人會把穿鞋的腳放在桌上，甚至把菸灰點到女孩子的頭上。報導指出，有日本商人表示，他曾接待過中國商業合作夥伴，對方要求要以價值32萬日圓的「女體盛」招待他。

報導表示，該日本商人說，看到女孩赤身裸體，身上生魚片等菜色一字排開，中國商人很興奮，不斷跟女體盛拍照，但拍完之後，日人邀請他喝「裙帶菜酒」（將女性身體作為酒器的性遊戲），對方卻嫌髒，整件事最後以談判順利做終。

曝奧斯爾想要離開阿仙奴！自薦搭檔C.朗拿度遭祖記拒絕


　　奧斯爾在阿仙奴的境況不佳，已經有了離隊傳聞，而球員也開始考慮尋找新東家。

　　對於已經年過三十的奧斯爾來說，這有可能會是他的最後一份大合約，此前曼聯、國米都和他傳出了緋聞。而《足球市場》透露，奧斯爾的經理人近期曾接觸祖雲達斯，並推薦球員，不過祖記體育經理帕拉蒂奇卻表示婉拒。而在今年1月時，奧斯爾也曾考慮過轉會祖記的可能性。

　　在上個月奧斯爾曾表示，當皇馬賣掉自己時C.朗拿度很生氣，並稱自己才是最懂C.朗拿度跑位的人。也許當時奧斯爾就想要來到祖雲達斯，和C.朗拿度再次並肩作戰。但這次被祖記拒絕後，奧斯爾還得繼續尋找願意接納自己的球隊，為離開阿仙奴做好準備。

《news-postseven》報導，像是在風俗區的店家裡，有中國人會把穿鞋的腳放在桌上，甚至把菸灰點到女孩子的頭上。報導指出，有日本商人表示，他曾接待過中國商業合作夥伴，對方要求要以價值32萬日圓的「女體盛」招待他。

報導表示，該日本商人說，看到女孩赤身裸體，身上生魚片等菜色一字排開，中國商人很興奮，不斷跟女體盛拍照，但拍完之後，日人邀請他喝「裙帶菜酒」（將女性身體作為酒器的性遊戲），對方卻嫌髒，整件事最後以談判順利做終。

曝奧斯爾想要離開阿仙奴！自薦搭檔C.朗拿度遭祖記拒絕


　　奧斯爾在阿仙奴的境況不佳，已經有了離隊傳聞，而球員也開始考慮尋找新東家。

　　對於已經年過三十的奧斯爾來說，這有可能會是他的最後一份大合約，此前曼聯、國米都和他傳出了緋聞。而《足球市場》透露，奧斯爾的經理人近期曾接觸祖雲達斯，並推薦球員，不過祖記體育經理帕拉蒂奇卻表示婉拒。而在今年1月時，奧斯爾也曾考慮過轉會祖記的可能性。

　　在上個月奧斯爾曾表示，當皇馬賣掉自己時C.朗拿度很生氣，並稱自己才是最懂C.朗拿度跑位的人。也許當時奧斯爾就想要來到祖雲達斯，和C.朗拿度再次並肩作戰。但這次被祖記拒絕後，奧斯爾還得繼續尋找願意接納自己的球隊，為離開阿仙奴做好準備。
